tldr: No live primary ads were captured in the scrape, so there's nothing in-market to fatigue-score right now. That's actually the bigger story — every day dark on Meta is a day competitors compound learnings and CPMs reset against you when you relaunch cold.

benchmark.context: Faith-led modest fashion and lifestyle brands typically sustain a creative for ~22 days before CPMs climb 20%+. With zero active ads detected, Deenin is starting from a cold pixel disadvantage versus category peers running 5-10 concurrent creatives.

ad_to_scale.headline: No live ads detected
ad_to_scale.body: No active Meta creatives were returned in the scrape for Deenin.
ad_to_scale.why: Without live ads in rotation, there is no winner to scale. The first priority is getting 3-5 distinct angles live so the pixel has signal to optimize against.

ad_to_kill.headline: No live ads detected
ad_to_kill.body: No active Meta creatives were returned in the scrape for Deenin.
ad_to_kill.why: Nothing to kill — but the absence itself is the issue. A dark account loses retargeting warmth fast, and lookalike seed audiences decay within 30-60 days of zero spend.

concepts.hook: Making wudhu in a public bathroom shouldn't feel like this.
concepts.primary_text: If you've ever tried to wash your feet in an airport sink, you already know. DEENIN's portable bidet and wudhu socks were built for the moments faith meets a non-Muslim public space — so you can stay clean, stay covered, and stay focused on your prayer instead of the awkward stares. Faith-driven essentials for the everyday Muslim. Shop the travel kit.
concepts.visual_direction: First-person POV in an airport restroom, then cut to the bidet + wudhu socks solving it cleanly. Warm, real, no actors.
concepts.fills_gap: Establishes a high-empathy problem-aware angle no other ad in rotation covers.

concepts.hook: Teaching kids the 5 pillars without a single screen.
concepts.primary_text: Our Islamic puzzles and affirmation cards turn deen into something kids reach for on their own. No app, no subscription, no battery — just hands-on tools that make Allah's love feel close at home. Built for Muslim parents raising confident kids in any environment. Tap to see the learning collection.
concepts.visual_direction: Frame-by-frame carousel: puzzle pieces clicking together, child holding affirmation card, parent smiling, product flat-lay, review quote, CTA.
concepts.fills_gap: Opens the parent/gifting buyer segment and adds a non-prayer-essentials SKU angle.

concepts.primary_text: If your hijab has ever slipped mid-meeting, you don't need another pin — you need a magnet that grips silk, chiffon, and jersey without leaving a mark. DEENIN hijab magnets and underscarves are the quiet upgrade thousands of sisters already swear by. Faith-driven, fabric-friendly, made to last. Shop the fashion essentials.
concepts.visual_direction: Side-by-side: snagged fabric from a pin vs. clean hold from a magnet. Bold typography, minimal palette.
concepts.fills_gap: Covers the fashion accessory line and introduces a fast-scrolling static format for cheap top-of-funnel reach.

unlocks: Get 3-5 distinct angles live within 10 days so the pixel has signal to optimize
Rebuild retargeting warmth before lookalike seeds decay past usable thresholds
Establish a creative testing cadence so no single ad carries the whole account
Lock in category-leading days-until-fatigue once volume is restored

next_step.urgency: Every dark day on Meta is a cold-start tax when you relaunch.
next_step.headline: Let's get DEENIN back in-market the right way
next_step.body: 30 minutes to map the first 5 creatives, the testing structure, and the budget split across prayer essentials, learning tools, and fashion. You'll leave with a launch plan whether we work together or not.

method_note: Scoring uses Apify Meta Ad Library scrape data; with zero primary ads returned, the forecast pivots to launch strategy rather than fatigue projection.
